---
title: "Step 7. Calculate area-adjusted Condition at project start (year 0)"
format: html
---
The following equation from Step 7 was used for validation of the tropical/sub-tropical dry forests ecosystem:

$$
Ca_0 = E_0 \times C_0
$$

Where:

-   $Ca_0$ = Area-adjusted condition

-   $E_0$ = Project extent at project start

-   $C_0$ = Condition at project start

<br>

The results are described in [Table 14](#table14).

<details>

<summary>Table 14. Area-adjusted Condition at Project Start</summary>

::::{#table14}
::::

<div class="terra-table-title">
Table 14. Area-adjusted Condition at Project Start
</div>

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(DT)


table_data <- data.frame(
  check.names = FALSE,
  
  `Ecosystem Type` = c(
    "Subtropical Dry Forests"
  ),
  
  `Project Extent (E0) (Ha)` = c(
    "122,158.00"
  ),
  
  C0 = c(
    "0.72"
  ),
  
  Ca0 = c(
    "87,347.99"
  )
)

datatable(
  table_data,
  options = list(
    paging = FALSE,
    searching = FALSE,
    info = FALSE,
    ordering = FALSE,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    autoWidth = FALSE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all")
    )
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  class = "stripe hover compact",
  
)
```

</details>
